/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -shared -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/lib -L/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/lib  -L/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libMPIDPluginCUDA.so -o libMPIDPluginCUDA.so CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/MPIDCudaKernelFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/MPIDCudaKernels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/CudaMPIDKernelSources.cpp.o   -L/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/lib/plugins  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/lib/plugins:/home/jmchen/project/PhyNEO/phyneo_openmm/MPIDOpenMMPlugin/build_gemini_v2: /home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart_static.a -ldl /home/jmchen/miniconda3/envs/mpid_plugin_v2/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/lib/librt.a -lOpenMM -lOpenMMCUDA ../../libMPIDPlugin.so -lOpenMM
